title: Why most product demos win the room and lose the rollout

slides.heading: Why most product demos win the room and lose the rollout
slides.body: Notes from shipping software to real teams.

slides.heading: A demo runs on clean, hand-picked inputs.
slides.body: Production runs on whatever users actually send.
slides.visual: split panel contrasting tidy and messy input

slides.heading: Make the happy path boring and the edge cases loud.
slides.body: Before you polish the pitch, handle the mess.

slides.heading: Earn the rollout, not just the applause.
slides.visual: closing card with the site URL

package.prompt: Square 1080x1080 slides in the tenant design system: paper background, single accent color, display serif headings, humanist sans body (design-system/tokens.json). Flat editorial infographic style, generous margins, no photography.

slidePrompts.prompt: Square 1080x1080 infographic title card, paper background, single accent color, display serif heading. Heading: Why most product demos win the room and lose the rollout. Subline: Notes from shipping software to real teams. Flat editorial style, generous margins.

Square 1080x1080 infographic, dark inverse variant: ink background, paper text, single accent color. Split panel contrasting tidy hand-picked demo inputs on the left with messy real user inputs on the right. Heading: A demo runs on clean, hand-picked inputs. Subline: Production runs on whatever users actually send.

Square 1080x1080 infographic checklist over a faint grid, paper background, single accent color. Heading: Make the happy path boring and the edge cases loud. Lead-in: Before you polish the pitch, handle the mess. Checklist items: Malformed input; Slow networks; Half-finished sessions.
Square 1080x1080 infographic closing card, paper background, single accent color, display serif heading. Heading: Earn the rollout, not just the applause. Footer URL: example.dev.
